item.title: Dubai – InterContinental Residence Suites
item.description: InterContinental Residence Suites Dubai Festival City encompasses luxury serviced living with an exquisite selection of studio, one, two and three-bedroom suites. Offering an exclusive and instinctive ability to marry the friendly everyday comforts of home with the exceptional five-star InterContinental services. Dubai Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment Dubai my apartment

item.title: Dubai
item.description: Dubai is a city and emirate in the United Arab Emirates known for luxury shopping, ultramodern architecture and a lively nightlife scene. Burj Khalifa, an 830m-tall tower, dominates the skyscraper-filled skyline. At its foot lies Dubai Fountain, with jets and lights choreographed to music. On artificial islands just offshore is Atlantis, The Palm, a resort with water and marine-animal parks. Burj Khalifa The Burj Khalifa, known as the Burj Dubai prior to its inauguration in 2010, is a skyscraper in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
